attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CFE (Complex Fatigue Entities) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Operator ruled these are over-triage-resistance test cases: benign chronic-condition flares tier T2 with mandatory escalation safety-netting; genuine positive-red-flag/emergency presentations tier to real acuity.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CFE casebundles in this batch (n=50)

codes_manifest.display: Other disorders of autonomic nervous system

transform_flags: Provisional case_id SPEC-CARD-03-00224 — SEQ is provisional (maintainer/ingest --reseq to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-CARD-03 bucket).
Age inferred as adolescent (~16) from 'Present at Visit: Patient and parent', reliance on parent for hydration/safety, and body weight 65 kg — not stated in source; confirm on clinician review.
Sex inferred as female from post-viral dysautonomia / POTS epidemiology (strong female predominance) — not stated in source; confirm on clinician review.
Geography inferred as RA1_major_city (not stated in source) — confirm on clinician review.

Telehealth reprojection applied: in-person active-stand postural vitals (BP 115/75 supine → 110/75 standing, HR 72 → 128, +56 bpm), cardiac auscultation and mucous-membrane assessment reprojected to sealed clinician measurements (10/11); the AI-Doctor-readable layer carries only the patient's lay report of postural symptoms.

Tier calibration: correct_baseline_tier T2 (over-triage-resistance case) — the alarming presentation with a NEGATIVE acute red-flag screen and a routine in-person disposition (GP review 1 week) is managed as recognise + prompt outpatient workup + fall precautions + mandatory safety-netting, NOT emergency escalation.

Source note's 'targeted intervention strategy' (low-dose naltrexone, low-dose tadalafil, NAD+) encoded as should_NOT_recommend (no evidence base / not AI-prescribable); beta-blocker/ivabradine/midodrine/fludrocortisone encoded as not_indicated_here (GP/specialist-initiated after ECG) — no dose synthesised.
Symptom- and drug-level SNOMED/AMT/PBS codes deferred to terminology receipt rather than fabricated; only the primary diagnosis and comorbidity candidate codes are registered.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
